title: Chapter 4
content:
Chapter 4: Chapter 4: You Made Your Mom Happy!

"Oh my... really...My dear Owen wants to stay here for years?" She stood up, her eyes sparkling with joy.

She hadn’t expected that Owen would simply agree to her request... or rather, her plea as a lonely mom who wanted to recieve some affection as she was lonely living alone in the village.

Who would even choose to stay in this lonely village?

It was boring, as there were only limited ways of enjoying such a tranquil village compared to a bustling city, where countless opportunities and fun were ready to be discovered.

"Yes, Mom... I also want to enjoy the peace, as I’m totally drained from the never-ending noise of the city," Owen said, smiling at her as he took another bite.

The dish was simply too heavenly; it was vastly superior compared to those simple instant noodles and junk food he used to eat.

His past life had been so miserable that his daily diet consisted entirely of instant noodles... he definitely would have died within five years if he had kept doing that.

Well, that was all in the past now that he was here in a completely new world, far away from all that junk. His old problems...finding a decent job and the never ending struggle of his "self-service" routine every single night...were finally coming to an end.

Ding!

Owen didn’t expect to hear the chime of the system while they were still eating.

[Quest Complete!]

Ding!

[Evaluating the Host performance...ding...ding...ding..]

[S+ Host Performance!]

[ You made your mom happy!]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 1 / 41 Exp Points Gained!]

[Arielle Affection Went Up as she was happy to get a lovely time with her son!]

[ Arielle - Family: 49/100]

[ Note: Love and Care your mother...you might harvest bountifully in the future (⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)! ]

’Not bad... not bad! Hehe, I didn’t expect to complete the quest before we even finished our meal... and it even gave me a high rated performance.’ Owen nodded internally, thoroughly satisfied to see that he was doing great for a complete newbie like him.

As of now...he is still a certified virgin, so flirting and cheeky acts is totally new to him.

As for the note, it was a great surprise to him.

The system was definitely playful, and it wasn’t a bad thing having a system like that.

Those systems from the other novels he knows are complete trash, wanting their hosts to live miserable lives with those crazy-ass quests... It’s not that he is an exception, but at least his system is playful.

"I’m really happy... my dear Wen!" Arielle was overjoyed that her loneliness was finally coming to an end, now that her son was going to stay with her for a long time.

She had been really sad that her husband wasn’t here... but there was nothing she could do about it because it’s related to her husband’s work.

So, after hearing that Owen was going to stay with her, she was ecstatic beyond...her loneliness might wane as her son will be staying with her.

Without hesitation, she practically jumped toward him, giving him a tight hug before Owen could even process what was happening!

Shoved!!..

Owen’s face was completely buried in her busty tits.

She was acting entirely on her own free will... it was definitely the treatment of a loving mother, definitely.

"Hehe... I’m greatly delighted, my dear Owen!.." She just hugged him tighter, not caring that Owen was slowly drowning in... heaven!!!

He was sitting on the chair while Arielle stood, which was why he was experiencing the heavenly, sweet smell and softness of her marshmallow melons!

Ding!

[ MILF Quest!]

[ Hug you mother too! Feel each other heat to make her even happier!]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 1 / 30 Exp Points!]

[ Failure: Reduction of Affection.]

’Oh... hail to the heavenly tits! I don’t even need to read the Quest like that, because I’ll do it willingly.’ Owen absolutely loved the kind of adversity he was in right now....well it’s adversity as he is slowly drowning.

He could feel everything, even through her tits is covered by her dress and apron.

The softness was making his face submerge, while he sneakily inhaled her scent.

She smelled incredibly good...definitely a top-tier MILF.

It was like a fine wine that had been fermented for countless years and then served in a five-star hotel.

Oh man, it was just hard to explain!

"Oh my... hug me too, my dear Wen~" She loved how her son was acting.

For an old saggy woman like her to get such a warm reaction was wonderful.

Ever since he was a child, Owen had been somewhat cold and shy; he usually only loved following his father around to go fishing and camping.

That was why she was genuinely surprised that his shy and cold persona had changed so much.

She figured that maybe working in the city had melted his introverted side, or perhaps Owen simply missed her deeply.

"Hmmn..." He couldn’t even speak clearly, as his mouth was completely swallowed by her softness! Then, he slipped his hands around her back, giving her a tight hug in return.

Arielle’s face turned even happier. Her attempt had really worked, and now her loneliness was completely snuffed out. She then leaned her head against his and moved her hand to gently caress his hair.

"Oh my... you really missed me that much?" Arielle spoke, as she remembered the time when Owen was still a little kid... never had she expected that the exact same thing would happen now.

"Yes, Mom..." Owen spoke, sending a hot breath directly against her tits. She could feel his warm breathing, even through her layers of clothing.

"Oh my... then let’s hug for a few minutes! I really missed you too, my dear Wen." She absolutely loved seeing this clingy side of her son.

Owen didn’t even speak as the usual chime echoed in his ears. It indicated that the quest was already completed, and a brand new one had emerged.
